mentions_legales.title: Legal Notice
mentions_legales.meta_description: Legal notice for Factur-X Prêt — facturx-pret.fr
mentions_legales.hebergement_text: This website is hosted by Hetzner Online GmbH, Industriestr. 25, 91710 Gunzenhausen, Germany.
mentions_legales.informations_text: In accordance with the provisions of French Law No. 2004-575 of June 21, 2004, on confidence in the digital economy (LCEN), users of facturx-pret.fr are informed of the identity of the parties involved in its creation and management.

confidentialite.title: Privacy Policy
confidentialite.meta_description: Privacy policy for Factur-X Prêt — facturx-pret.fr
confidentialite.intro: We respect your privacy. This policy describes what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
confidentialite.collecte_text: We only collect data necessary for the operation of the service: email address upon registration, invoice data entered or uploaded, and technical connection data (IP address, browser).
confidentialite.utilisation_text: Your data is used exclusively to generate your Factur-X invoices and manage your account. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties.
confidentialite.conservation_text: Invoice data is retained for the duration of your account. You may request deletion of your data at any time.
confidentialite.droits_text: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, erase, and port your data. Contact us at support@facturx-pret.fr.
confidentialite.cookies_text: This site only uses technical cookies necessary for the operation of the service. No advertising or tracking cookies are used.
confidentialite.contact_text: For any questions regarding the protection of your data, contact us at support@facturx-pret.fr.

cgv.title: Terms of Service
cgv.meta_description: Terms of Service for Factur-X Prêt — facturx-pret.fr
cgv.intro: These Terms of Service govern the use of the Factur-X Prêt service provided by Radom UG (haftungsbeschränkt).
cgv.objet_text: The Factur-X Prêt service enables the generation of electronic invoices in Factur-X 1.0.8 format compliant with the EN 16931 standard.
cgv.tarifs_text: The service offers free access limited to 3 invoices per day as well as paid subscriptions (Starter, Professional, Enterprise). Prices are shown in euros including VAT.
cgv.paiement_text: Payments are processed by Stripe. Subscriptions are automatically renewed unless cancelled before the renewal date.
cgv.responsabilite_text: Factur-X Prêt provides an invoice generation tool. The user is solely responsible for the accuracy of the data entered and the tax compliance of their invoices.
cgv.resiliation_text: You may cancel your subscription at any time from your account dashboard. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
cgv.droit_applicable_text: These Terms are governed by German law. Any disputes shall be brought before the competent courts of Frankfurt am Main.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.text: Have a question about the service or electronic invoicing? Feel free to reach out.
